title: Verify serve range computation handles edge cases at FULU_FORK_EPOCH boundary
summary: min_epoch_data_availability_boundary correctly handles edge cases through saturating arithmetic and max() clamping. No underflow or incorrect range calculation possible.

title: Verify anti-equivocation cache is updated for locally-imported columns (not just gossip)

summary: State invariant requires manual state analysis for MEDIUM severity issue: Peer Quality Degradation / Network Efficiency Loss.

summary: CL pre-validates execution payload fields before Engine API call. All fields (block_hash, versioned_hashes, parent_hash, timestamp, randao) validated.

title: Verify peer discovery ensures minimum peer count per custody group

title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity for custody assignment: node ID manipulation resistance
